item.title: It's the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
it really is uncanny
I’ve been attacked
probably Greg
looks serious
I mean, yeah
yes this is sportsball related
terrified of the ocean beyond 10 ft deep.. no thanks
it’s true
sounds scary, having a wife
he brought it upon himself
my hero
hmm.. gonna pass
mmm hmm
someone’s gotta do it
only in Africa apparently.. phew
do it
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!

item.title: So called "Alpha males" really should watch this
item.description:
Imgur please work with me and upload these on the website in order... Part 1
part 2
part 3
Part 4 Seriously though, I enjoy stuff because I enjoy it. I don't need some fake alpha telling me that something I enjoy makes me less of a man because this dude doesn't enjoy complex flavors. GTFO with that! Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fj1iTq45n0I

item.title: Rising up against the Right
item.description:
80.000+ people in Hamburg, Germany protesting against fascism and far-right populists' racist agendas. So proud today of my people back home! :) After information about a clandestine meeting of right wing populists & fascists was leaked about a week ago, spontaneous protests have sprung up all over Germany - it is so heartening! Organizers of this particular event expected and had a permit for 10k attendees... an estimated 70 - 130k people showed up on a random cold Friday to promote diversity! The event had to disperse early since downtown was getting too crowded and people were at risk of being pushed into the river. I love and miss this level of civic involvement: standing up for what's right and against right-wing bs.
Regular people out there showing their colors, with broad support by leaders from all walks of life - unions, teachers, politicians, churches, you name it... The mayor attended and spoke out strongly against intolerance and hate. This is how it should be!
The new fascist party calls itself AfD. They tried to sabotage the event. The public didn't care & showed up in record numbers to condemn these neo-nazis and their rhetoric. It's important to go out and reassure others with their heads and hearts in the right place that they have strong support. Yay for the silent majority speaking up for inclusion and democracy based on healthy values. America: take notes!
.
item.dc:creator: bildschoen

item.title: Almost at my 1 year mark!
item.description: I went back home for a quick visit and to pick up my cats, and all my old friends didn't like me. I look different, I sound different, I act different, im not the same. It hurt my feelings but in retrospect, THAT WAS THE POINT! If you're hiding in the closet, it's rough, and it will happen on your own time. But I encourage you to be your true self. You are loved.
item.dc:creator: kitenkatt

item.title: We did a thing!
item.description: My wife and I managed to buy a home. As a millennial I can honestly say I did not think that would ever happen. It took hard work and a lot of luck to work out, but I can finally say I'm a home owner. Managed to do it just before I turned 40.
item.dc:creator: jesterablaze

item.title: Just to be perfectly clear
item.description: There are exactly 289 days until Decision 2024 and there is lot's to be done! First things first .... register to vote / check your registration ... vote.org Secondly get involved, here are some handy links https://runforsomething.net/run/candidate-support-system/ https://www.turnoutpac.org/ https://justicedemocrats.com/ https://ballotpedia.org/Election_results,_2022:_Uncontested_races_by_state Why: https://www.axios.com/2023/11/13/trump-loyalists-2024-presidential-election EVERYTHING IS ON THE LINE!

Probably my friends to whoever I end up dating next.
Maiasaura herd, by Doug Henderson
I realize in my half-asleep state some of these got posted yesterday. I need to stop that....
Katrina Dirim
Yeah, this is accurate for how I feel this morning.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Beep."

item.dc:creator: MedicalScience

item.title: If I go to jail soon, this is why. Worth it.
item.description:
This is Perfect Dog. Name changed to protect the innocent. Perfect Dogs owner got put in jail in November for a SUPER HEINOUS GROSS crime and it doesn't look like hes getting out any time soon. PD was left outside with a heavy chain around his neck for basically his whole life, but recently it was going to be -28 outside and he wouldnt have survived, despite the neighbors trying their best to take care of him.
So I got a call and went to meet PD. And I was like Holy Shit he's so perfect. So I got a few people together that would all chip in to board him at our local vets, so he would be out of the weather. Once we had the funds, we found out he wasnt vaccinated so he couldnt go in. We didnt have the money to Vax AND board.. Step two-
Talked to prior owners father, who owned the property and he was more than happy that PD was going to go somewhere to be safe and warm and fed. Talked to the jail because I wanted to talk to prior owner but was denied.
My friend's senior dog passed away a few months ago and hes been very lonely. So he agreed to let PD stay with him while it was super cold.
Safe to say they got on swell and it only took a minute for my friend to want to keep PD forever and ever. PD was happy with this arrangement as well.
(Big ol' feet!) Sorry the photos are blurry. Hes a wiggler and my phone is terrible. Anyways..
The first day PD arrived, he slept for 16 hours, only waking once to potty and eat a small meal. Small, because hes very underweight and his tummy has shrunk up. He had a mild seizure on day 2 but we didnt find anything aside from shock that might have caused it.
He went to the vet, got vaxxed, heartworm tested negative (though he has to be retested in a few months just to make sure), they found out hes about 30 lbs under weight and could barely get blood out of him. He flinches if you pick anything up, but he loves to be cuddled and told how good he is. Because he is SO GOOD! He's not neutered, but we cant schedule that until he is healthier anyways.
IF prior owner gets out of jail, and comes after me or PD, im fully prepared to go to court with the signed papers, witnesses that have come forward about his abuse, vets reports, city statements and all that. PD deserves perfect home. Legally im not worried about prior owner winning (if he even makes it out of jail because a lot of people that go in for his type of crime get targeted anyways), im worried he will come after my friend that has the dog, or me, in a violent manner.
But this little ham is worth it. Because even after abuse, neglect, abandonment, he is so sweet and gentle.
And who doesnt love a nap puddle on the floor. Ill try to keep you guys updated.
Bonus peets!
item.dc:creator: thecitrinewitch

item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018

item.title: Always remember, the system is designed to squeeze everything it can out of you while giving you as little as possible. Sometimes nothing. Demand better in all facets of life.
item.description: Don't meekly accept the world as it is. Fight for a better society that treats people better. That cares more. That does more for them. Whether at your job, your voting booth, or with the people are you, create a better world. And always be in solidarity with the people who want to make a better world. The strikers who are against unfair working conditions, the reformers, the activists trying to prevent or relieve suffering. Acting together makes it better for everyone. Refusing to do that makes it continue.
item.dc:creator: politicalwanderer
